title: Heart Trouble
writer: Gardner Bradford, Clarence Hennecke, Harry Langdon
actors: Harry Langdon, Doris Dawson, Lionel Belmore
plot: Harry Van Housen, the son of German immigrants, desperately wants to enlist in the United States Army during World War I in order to prove to his sweetheart that he is a true-blue American. Every time Harry volunteers for service,...
